SEARCH
Package bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.test

Class CustomerTest

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.test.CustomerTest
@DisplayName("Customer Class Tests") public class CustomerTest extends Object
Comprehensive unit tests for the Customer class using JUnit 5. Tests all constructors, getters, setters, and business logic.
